# Summary

This book is truly interesting and full of joy :)

In summary, this book has no content whatsoever. 
This is another plain text sentence. 
**This is a bold face sentence.**

1. First point
2. Second point

## Summary First section

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
ggplot(iris) +
    geom_point(aes(x = Sepal.Width, y = Sepal.Length))
```
